name: Oven-Barbecued Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken on all sides in a skillet coated with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Transfer the chicken to a greased 11-inch baking dish.
3. Top the chicken with onion.
4. Combine the chili sauce, tomato sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and oregano in a separate bowl.
5. Pour the sauce mixture over the chicken.
6. Sprinkle pepper on top of the chicken.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes, or until the meat juices run clear.
8. Yield: 2-3 servings.
